Document:
# Gray
Gray are an exterrestrial species with origins from galaxies far away. Although it is unknown how long Grays have been known to other species outside of hoaxes and delusional hysteria, they appear to have a vast knowledge of terra's pop culture from centuries ago as well as a large knowledge of the late 20th century on the planet also.
## Sounds Gray appear to have a unique biology compared to most other species, this includes Gray Respiratory Organs or the "Oogmards" to channel harmonic sounds.
## Dialects Gray dialect has adapted from many years of attempting to communicate with humanoid species to standards acceptable for NanoTrasen's employment Department to introduce them aboard stations, many unsure of their way of speaking may find them abnormal,
## Gray Name Conventions Gray Vines have a plethora of name styles across the many galaxies but usually fall into two categories,
### Terra Observers Observers are known for their love of Terra's late 20th century pop culture, They usually strive to emanate their favourite actors and cultural staples of the time.
### Glorpii Zasbaahs Glorpiis are the blanketted term for those who didn't observe the 'Gray Golden Years' or those without an interest in the archived taped reruns on Xehennel L-5, These names are close to their Dialect, usually being irregular to most humanoid species standards.
## Low Pressure Living Due to the poor construction of saucers and other flying objects, Gray have developed better to withstand lower pressure environments than most other species.
